TABLE DOD_INVOICE_ITEMS(
  row_id,                -- primary key
  invheadid,             -- references DOD_INVOICE_HEADER.row_id
  prd_id,                -- product id
  prddesc,               -- product description
  hsncode,               -- HSN code

  qty,                   -- quantity
  uom,                   -- unit of measure
  price,                 -- unit price
  discount,              -- discount

  taxable_value,         -- taxable value

  cgstrate, cgstamt,     -- CGST
  sgstrate, sgstamt,     -- SGST
  igstrate, igstamt,     -- IGST

  totalitemval,          -- total item value

  status,                -- PENDING, FINAL
  tenant_id,
  deleted_state,
  created,
  updated
)
